supported_here: R15 keeps the same direct-baseline endpoint fixed while filling the four remaining R6 family gaps under bounded retrieval pressure.
Admitted rows export event, read/write, candidate-depth, stack-depth, and control-transfer growth explicitly rather than implying remaining-family pressure qualitatively.
unsupported_here: R15 does not widen semantics, reopen arbitrary compiled-language claims, or justify a broader systems-superiority statement.
Any contradiction-only route to E1c remains narrower than a general endpoint expansion.
